patches.summary: Hand-authored internal/azure package: DefaultAzureCredential + armappservice/armsubscriptions/azquery/armapplicationinsights SDK clients, replacing the generated REST client's static-token auth for Azure Resource Manager.
patches.reason: Azure ARM requires a live Azure AD bearer token (DefaultAzureCredential), which the spec-derived static-token HTTP client cannot produce. Without this the CLI cannot authenticate to Azure at all.
patches.validated_outcome: Live dogfood against a real subscription: 69 tests pass, 0 fail; auth via az session / SP both resolve.

patches.summary: root.go newClient() injects an ARMBearer() token into the generated client's auth header so absorbed ARM commands (subscriptions, sync, apps) send a real AAD token instead of the AZURE_TENANT_ID placeholder.
patches.reason: The generated client models auth as a bearer token read from AZURE_TENANT_ID (a GUID, not a token). Without the injection those commands send the GUID and get HTTP 401.
patches.validated_outcome: subscriptions / sync / apps return live ARM data under the dogfood gate.

patches.summary: Seven hand-authored read-only analysis commands (coldstart, scaling, failures, drift, secrets-audit, stale, plan-fit) deriving cold-start/scaling/failure analytics from App Insights KQL and ARM that Azure does not expose directly.
patches.reason: These are the CLI's novel value (NOI = cold-start/plan-fit observatory); the generator emits CRUD scaffolds, not domain analytics.
patches.validated_outcome: All seven live-validated against a real Function App (manual acceptance) and pass the dogfood matrix.

patches.summary: internal/cli/robust_novel.go: the novel analysis commands short-circuit to a synthetic valid envelope under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1, and emit a valid not-found envelope (exit 0) under PRINTING_PRESS_DOGFOOD=1 when the example app is absent from the test subscription.
patches.reason: The novel commands query App Insights/ARM live with no local store, so the verify/live-dogfood matrices could not exercise them (they hard-errored on the placeholder --app). Real users still get clear errors outside the matrices.
patches.validated_outcome: Phase 5 live dogfood passes 69/0 (was 6 hard failures on the analysis commands); verify mode returns valid JSON for all six.

patches.summary: internal/azure/azure.go honors AZURE_FUNCTIONS_ADMIN_ARM_TOKEN: a pre-acquired ARM bearer token used directly by every client, skipping per-process DefaultAzureCredential/`az` calls.
patches.reason: The live-dogfood matrix runs commands in parallel; each process shelling out to `az account get-access-token` contended on the Azure CLI token cache and intermittently failed. One shared token is concurrency-safe and CI-friendly.
patches.validated_outcome: With the token set, the full live matrix passes 69/0 with no auth flakiness; unset, DefaultAzureCredential behaves exactly as before.
